title: bupleurum salicifolium subsp. aciphyllum
intro: Bupleurum salicifolium subsp. aciphyllum, also known as a subspecies of the Bupleurum salicifolium plant, is a type of flowering plant in the carrot family (Apiaceae). It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Bupleurum salicifolium subsp. aciphyllum include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. It can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
